subcodes.first_line: The oceans of praise and thanksgiving, and the heavens of remembrance and glorification, befit and are worthy of the people of God, who amidst barking and snarling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بحور حمد و شکر و سماء ذکر و ثنا حزب الله را لایق و سزا که قباع و نباح و مواء
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat], @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power of the Manifestation of God
